sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n1153" key="a)daca/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀδαξάω</orth>, or <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀδαμ-έω</orth>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀδαξῆσαι, ἀδάξομαι</foreign>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">v.</abbr> sub <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὀδάξω.</foreign> </entryFree>
